project.name: SocialEngine
project.description: Python FastAPI swarm AI for social dynamics simulation — agent profiles, social graphs, swarm behavior, simulation configuration, and real-time report generation.

nodes.name: common/worldos_cache.py
nodes.summary: Shared Redis cache client used across sim and narrative-loom for WorldOS state.

nodes.name: social-engine/Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Dockerfile for the SocialEngine FastAPI service.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/__init__.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application factory creating the app instance with CORS and middleware configuration.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/api/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Python file __init__.py in the SocialEngine simulation service.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/api/swarm_routes.py
nodes.summary: REST API route handlers for swarm simulation, task management, results retrieval, and process control.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/config.py
nodes.summary: Application configuration loader for simulation environment, API keys, database connections, and service settings.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/models/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Python file __init__.py in the SocialEngine simulation service.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/models/project.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic data model for simulation project definition including parameters, inputs, and configuration.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/models/task.py
nodes.summary: Task status model tracking simulation job lifecycle from submission through completion.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Python file __init__.py in the SocialEngine simulation service.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/graph_builder.py
nodes.summary: Builds and maintains social graph structures representing relationships between simulation agents.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/log_parser.py
nodes.summary: Parses structured and unstructured simulation logs into analyzable event streams.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/oasis_profile_generator.py
nodes.summary: Specialized profile generator for OASIS-style simulation scenarios.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/ontology_generator.py
nodes.summary: Generates ontological knowledge structures from simulation data for semantic analysis.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/process_manager.py
nodes.summary: Process lifecycle management for simulation runner subprocesses and resource allocation.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/report_agent.py
nodes.summary: AI-driven report generation producing simulation analysis summaries and narrative insights.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/runner_models.py
nodes.summary: Data models specific to simulation runner configuration and execution results.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/simulation_config_generator.py
nodes.summary: Generates simulation configurations from input parameters — topology, duration, population, and scenario rules.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/simulation_ipc.py
nodes.summary: Inter-Process Communication layer between simulation manager and runner processes.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/simulation_manager.py
nodes.summary: Orchestration service managing simulation lifecycle — spawning, monitoring, and terminating simulation jobs.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/simulation_runner.py
nodes.summary: Core simulation executor running swarms through iterative behavioral loops with decision-making agents.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/swarm_profile_factory.py
nodes.summary: Generates diverse agent profiles with personality traits, backgrounds, and behavioral parameters for swarm simulations.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/text_processor.py
nodes.summary: NLP text processing utilities for agent dialogue and narrative content analysis.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/timeline_builder.py
nodes.summary: Builds chronological event timelines from simulation events for narrative construction.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/zep_entity_reader.py
nodes.summary: Reads entity state from Zep knowledge graph memory store.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/zep_graph_memory_updater.py
nodes.summary: Updates Zep graph memory with new simulation-generated social structure changes.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/services/zep_tools.py
nodes.summary: Utility functions for Zep memory store integration.

nodes.summary: File parsing utilities for simulation input data formats.

nodes.summary: LLM API client abstraction for OpenAI, Anthropic, and other AI provider integrations.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/utils/logger.py
nodes.summary: Structured logging configuration with simulation-specific context.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/utils/reality_loader.py
nodes.summary: Loads ground-truth reality data for simulation baselining and validation.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/utils/retry.py
nodes.summary: Retry utility with exponential backoff for external API calls.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/utils/worldos_cache.py
nodes.summary: Redis-backed caching layer for WorldOS simulation state.

nodes.name: social-engine/app/utils/zep_paging.py
nodes.summary: Pagination helpers for Zep graph memory queries.

tour.description: Start from the FastAPI entry point and configuration to understand how the service boots and exposes simulation routes.
